name: Himejima Akeno
description:
Akeno Himejima is one of the many female protagonists of the serie High School DxD. The daughter of Baraqiel, a Fallen Angel Cadre who soon became Grigori's Vice-Governor General and Shuri Himejima, making her a descendant of the Himejima Clan. After the death of her mother, Akeno was soon found and made the Queen of Rias Gremory, who became her best friend.

Akeno is one of Kuoh Academy's Two Great Ladies alongside Rias, soon becoming a first-year collage student. She is also one of hyoudou Issei's fiancées.
creator: danyedan
